Paths.Source path of localization files: Folder with json localization files ("localize" folder if you downloaded them from GitHub)

Json files formatting.Existing files overwriting rule: If Json content itself is not the same
Json files formatting.UTF-8 Byte Order Marks: Keep BOM if they are inside original file

Font files.Title font file: [⇲] Assets Directory/Localization Files Processor/Assets for profiles/Ru-MTL Translation Export/Merged Font/Title.ttf
Font files.Context font file: [⇲] Assets Directory/Localization Files Processor/Assets for profiles/Ru-MTL Translation Export/Merged Font/Context.ttf

Miscellaneous.Keyword Shorthands files whitelist: Skills*.json, Passive*.json, EGOgift_*.json, PanicInfo*.json, BuffAbilities.json, MentalCondition*.json, BattleKeywords*.json, Bufs*.json, Walpu*EventText.json, UI_Mission_MirrorDungeon*Event.json

Merged fonts.Merged font Characters Replacement Map: [⇲] Assets Directory/Localization Files Processor/Assets for profiles/Ru-MTL Translation Export/Merged Font/Characters Replacement Map.json
Merged fonts.Merged font Multiple Apply config: [⇲] Assets Directory/Localization Files Processor/Assets for profiles/Ru-MTL Translation Export/Merged Font/Merged Font Multiple Apply Config.json
